title: Gardulla (disambiguation)
content:
'''Gardulla''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
*'''[[Gardulla Besadii the Elder]]''', a rival of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure]].
*'''[[Gardulla (drink)]]''', an [[Alcohol|alcoholic]] beverage. 

==Legends==
*'''[[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla Besadii the Elder]]''', a rival of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].
*'''[[Gardulla Besadii the Younger]]''', an advisor to [[Borga Besadii Diori|Borga the Hutt]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong War|War]].
*'''[[Gardulla (drink)/Legends|Gardulla (drink)]]''', an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage.

{{Disambig}}
